LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIEU, JULIE CHRISTINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLA BULATOV, AN INDIVIDUAL IGOR KRYAN, AN INDIVIDUAL $4,245.19 PRINCIPAL, $22.68 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,492.87, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT *VACATED PER COURT ORDER OF MAR-21-2013*
